hooks.command: git add -u -- ':!.claude/' && git add -- '*.html' '*.js' '*.css' '*.ts' '.gitignore' '.claude/settings.json' 2>/dev/null; if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -5 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//'); git commit -m "Update: $FILES" && git push origin master; fi 2>/dev/null || true
